current_chart_value: Carol G. Cole, an 81-year-old female, requires home health following a recent hospitalization for hypokalemia, acute kidney failure, and hypomagnesemia. Her potassium level was critically low at 2.4 mmol/L, requiring IV repletion and close monitoring. She also has a history of atrial fibrillation on anticoagulation, hypertension, and arthritis, contributing to her medical complexity. Functional limitations affect her ability to perform some activities of daily living independently, and she is at risk for falls due
